case_title: KENDALL, DENNIS A. VS CRUZ, CONNIE AKA CONNIE BUCKLE YARIMI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KENDALL, DENNIS A. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CONNIE AKA CONNIE BUCKLE YARIMI FINISHING TOUCH UNITED PARCEL SERVICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE
PER TELEPHONE CALL FROM MR. DENNIS KENDALL,HE WILL BE FLYING FROM NEW YORK, MONDAY 1/13/97 FOR HIS JAN. 14, 1997 COURT DATE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENDALL, DENNIS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, CONNIE AKA CONNIE BUCKLE YARIMI FINISHING TOUCH $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, JUDGMNT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFT UNITED PARCEL SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-06-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF NOV-08-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENDALL, DENNIS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, CONNIE AKA CONNIE BUCKLE YARIMI FINISHING TOUCH $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,120.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF UNITED PARCEL SERVICE.NUNC PRO TUNC JUDGMENT AMENDED TO INCLUDE $120 COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FINISHING TOUCH
